Description: Vendor can successfully register with valid details and receive a confirmation email
System rejects invalid registration inputs (missing fields, invalid email format, weak password)
Vendor can log in with correct credentials and land on the dashboard
System rejects incorrect password with appropriate error; account locks after N failed attempts
Session expires after inactivity timeout; user is redirected to login

Scenario Title: Invoice Submission — Happy Path (PDF, valid PO)
Description: Vendor successfully submits a valid PDF invoice against an existing PO
System rejects unsupported file formats with a clear error message
System rejects files exceeding the maximum allowed size
System prevents invoice submission against a non-existent or expired PO
System detects and flags/rejects a duplicate invoice submission
System flags or blocks invoice where amount exceeds PO ceiling value
System prevents submission if mandatory invoice fields are empty
Vendor can edit invoice details prior to final submission
AP reviewer can view and approve an invoice; status changes to Approved
AP reviewer can reject invoice with a mandatory reason; vendor is notified
Two AP reviewers cannot simultaneously action the same invoice
All AP actions (approve/reject/comment) are logged with timestamp and user ID
Approved invoice is successfully forwarded to payment system with correct payload
System handles payment API unavailability gracefully (queues, alerts, does not silently drop)
Vendor receives email notification immediately after invoice submission
Vendor receives approval email with invoice and payment details
Vendor receives rejection email including the rejection reason
AP team is notified when a new invoice is submitted and awaiting review
System generates monthly invoice activity report with correct data for the period
Only authorized users can access reports; vendors see only their own data

Scenario Title: RBAC — Vendor Cannot Access AP Functions
Description: Vendor user cannot access AP approval screens or other vendors data

Scenario Title: RBAC — AP User Cannot Modify Vendor Data
Description: AP user cannot edit vendor profile or submit invoices on behalf of a vendor
Accessing protected URLs without a valid session redirects to login
